text_preview:
Appendix F: 
Plant PLC Listing 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Improvements: SCADA Design Criteria 
Technical Memorandum
artifact_summary: Title page for Appendix F of the HFC AWTP Master Plan, introducing the Plant PLC Listing inventory.
artifact_blurb: This document serves as the official title page for Appendix F within the HFC AWTP Master Plan Technical Memorandum. It functions as a cover sheet specifically dedicated to the 'Plant PLC Listing' section, providing an introductory overview for the comprehensive inventory of Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs) utilized across the facility.
